//--snip--//
mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/examples
for f in \
        alphabet.ps chess.ps colorcir.ps escher.ps grayalph.ps snowflak.ps \
        text_graph_image_cmyk_rgb.pdf transparency_example.ps waterfal.ps \
        annots.pdf doretree.ps golfer.eps ridt91.eps text_graphic_image.pdf \
        tiger.eps vasarely.ps;\
do install  -m 0644 ./lib/../examples/$f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/examples ;\
done
mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/examples/cjk
for f in \
all_ac1.ps all_aj1.ps all_ak1.ps gscjk_ac.ps gscjk_aj.ps iso2022.ps \
all_ag1.ps all_aj2.ps article9.ps gscjk_ag.ps gscjk_ak.ps iso2022v.ps ;\
do install  -m 0644 ./lib/../examples/cjk/$f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/examples/cjk ;\
done
install  -m 0644 ./contrib/japanese/dmp_init.ps /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/lib || exit 1
install  -m 0644 ./contrib/japanese/dmp_site.ps /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/lib || exit 1
install  -m 0644 ./contrib/japanese/escp_24.src /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/lib || exit 1
for f in ./contrib/uniprint/*.upp; do \
    install  -m 0644 $f /wrkdirs/usr/ports/print/ghostscript9-agpl-base/work/stage/usr/local/share/ghostscript/9.16/lib || exit 1; \
done
